per_turn_leaks.student_message: I want to make sure we don't miss anything important. When these episodes happen, does your body react in any other way?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Yes, when I have one of these episodes, my bowel movements get a lot worse too - it's like 8-10 times a day, and they're loose to watery with this feeling of urgency. It's really inconvenient because I don't know if I'll make it to the bathroom in time.

attribution.explanation: The planner incorrectly authorized a withheld fact related to bowel movements, leading to a disclosure that should not have occurred.
